title: Ginkgo Font
description: A Cleaner, Vanilla-like Font for Minecraft - Part of the Ginkgo series
body:
# Ginkgo Font - A Cleaner, Vanilla-Like Font for Minecraft
Enhance your Minecraft experience with Ginkgo Font, a resource pack that brings a cleaner, easier to read version of the classic vanilla font.

Originally part of the **Ginkgo resource pack**, this font has now been split off into its own add-on pack. This gives you the flexibility to use the font on its own or pair it with any other resource pack you prefer.
## Demonstration
![Before and After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddf8e67eea7bdb253bc185bfaa160bad673d7a83.png)
## Compatibility
This font pack should be out-of-the-box compatible with all other packs, so long as you place it above any other pack you're using.
### If you ever see a issue while using this pack contact me on Discord
